name: Microwave Cherry Preserves
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cherries, water, lemon juice and pectin in a 3-quart, microwave safe bowl.
2. Cover with plastic wrap or waxed paper.
3. Bring to a boil in the microwave oven on high setting (about 8 minutes).
4. Remove from the oven and stir in remaining ingredients.
5. Cover; place back in the microwave oven; return to a boil on high setting (about 6 minutes).
6. Stir and return to microwave, uncovered.
7. Cook for 3 minutes.
8. Stir again and return to microwave oven, uncovered.
9. Cook for an additional 3 minutes or until preserves set from spoon.
10. Remove from oven; skim foam if necessary.
11. Pour hot into hot jars, leaving 1/4 inch head space.
12. Adjust lids.
13. Process in a boiling water bath for 10 minutes.
14. Do not attempt to process in microwave oven.
15. Yield: about 3 half pints.
